title: Gated NLAH mutation (generation bump)
description: Implement claude.md §5A steps 3-4 for proposals accepted by the human: apply minimal diffs to claude.md/gemini.md, re-run the contract tests (T-000-style lifecycle + T-002-style cross-engine check), bump state.json harness_generation and blackboard generation, git commit 'generation 1'. acceptance_criteria: human approval recorded in the task notes before any NLAH edit
verification gate re-run green after the mutation
